title: Fix usage stats: weekly + 5-hour rolling window periods
description: Claude Code Pro uses two reset cycles: (1) a 5-hour rolling window starting from the first prompt in that window, and (2) a weekly cap that resets on Mondays. The current /api/usage-stats endpoint uses a monthly billing period (billingDay in config.json) which is wrong. Need to: update config.json to replace billingDay with weeklyResetDay, update /api/usage-stats to compute both a weekly period (Mon-Mon) and a 5-hour rolling window, and update the UsageDashboard component to display both periods with correct labels.

title: Usage Dashboard: UsageDashboard React component + view state + top bar
description:
Backend and CSS are complete (commit 09c5cc1). Three things remaining:
1. Add UsageDashboard component to app.js (before App function)
2. Add view state ('sessions' | 'usage') and usageStats state to App
3. Update top bar to be dynamic per-project and include totalTokens stat

Resume point from changelog: add UsageDashboard component before App function, add view/usageStats state, update top bar render to be dynamic and include tokens.
close_reason: UsageDashboard component, view/usageStats state, and dynamic top bar all implemented and verified in browser
